narrative:
Washington Twp township has 1,471 registered voters, with 59.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.7 percentage points.
